name: Labubu Arrow Shooter
description: Labubu Arrow Shooter is a fun target-shooting game with a playful twist! Aim your arrow and try to hit as many targets as possible. Be careful not to hit the rope, or poor Labubu might fall into the pool! Score as many points as you can, beat your best results, and climb the leaderboard to prove youre the ultimate shooter.
instructions: Click and hold the left mouse button to aim and build power then release to shoot
